title: Problem-Driven Design Patterns · Program Brief: Oop Adapter Pattern
summary: Add pricing, notifications, imports, commands, and persistence without turning patterns into ceremony. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop adapter pattern increment in an extensible library operations toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Wrap an incompatible external API behind the small role the application actually needs.
Use factory functions or objects when construction choice, configuration, validation, or lifecycle must be centralized.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
